title: Thai Poosam
summary: Murugan receives the divine Vel; major pilgrimage and kavadi devotion.

title: Skanda Sashti
summary: Six-day remembrance of Murugan’s victory over Surapadman.

title: Vaikasi Visakam
summary: Celebrates the divine manifestation of Lord Murugan.

title: Panguni Uthiram
summary: Sacred day associated with divine marriages and grace.

title: Karthigai Deepam
summary: Festival of lamps and spiritual light.

title: Masi Magam
summary: Holy bath, processions and purification observances.
